summary: Australia’s Woodside Energy Group Ltd. said it expects stronger prices for liquefied natural gas to boost its earnings in coming quarters due to time lags in its supply contracts.

title: Deutsche Bank Flags Commercial Property as Risk After Hit
title_cn: 德意志银行将商业地产列为风险
summary: Deutsche Bank AG suffered a dent in its exposure to commercial real estate and highlighted that the asset continues to be a problem for it.

title: Deutsche CFO Says Credit, FX Continue to 'Outperform' Expectations
title_cn: 德意志银行首席财务官表示信贷和外汇继续“跑赢”预期
summary: Deutsche Bank CFO Raja Akram discusses the lender's first-quarter results, fixed-income trading and global uncertainty in light of the situation in the Middle East. "Credit and FX continue to outperform our expectations," Akram tells Bloomberg's Oliver Crook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Stocks Rise in Run-Up to Megacap Earnings: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 科技股在巨额盈利前上涨：市场总结
summary: Stock traders are buying the dip in technology shares as markets get ready for earnings from four juggernauts in a crucial test of whether this month’s rally still has room to run.

title: King Charles Urges US to Reject Isolationism
title_cn: 查尔斯国王敦促美国拒绝孤立主义
summary: US and UK ties are at their lowest point since the Suez Crisis in the 1950s as King Charles III visits Washington. In an address to lawmakers, Charles argued for preserving the countries' alliance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GSK’s Older Respiratory Drugs Disappoint Amid Overhaul
title_cn: 葛兰素史克老款呼吸系统药物在改革中令人失望
summary: GSK Plc’s older respiratory medicines showed lackluster sales in the first quarter, leaving HIV and cancer drugs to drive profit growth.

title: Carlsberg Sales Rise as Alcohol-Free Drinks Gain Traction
title_cn: 无酒精饮料受欢迎，嘉士伯销量上升
summary: Carlsberg A/S started the year with positive sales volumes in all regions, a sign the Danish brewer’s strategy to diversify into alcohol-free drinks is working in spite of disruptions from the Iran war.

title: Aston Martin Posts Another Loss as Carmaker’s Debt Swells
title_cn: 随着汽车制造商债务膨胀，阿斯顿·马丁再次亏损
summary: Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc reported another quarterly loss as the automaker struggles to engineer a turnaround under billionaire Lawrence Stroll who’s putting up a further £50 million to ease the pressure.

title: European Airports Warn of Tough Outlook as War Disrupts Flights
title_cn: 由于战争中断航班，欧洲机场警告前景严峻
summary: Operators of Europe’s largest airports are warning of an increasingly uncertain outlook as the Middle East conflict adjusts flight schedules and restricts access to key airspaces.

title: ECB Finds No Clear Case to Hike Yet on Lane’s Data Dashboard
title_cn: 欧洲央行在莱恩的数据仪表板上尚未发现明确的加息理由
summary: The array of data the European Central Bank is scrutinizing to pinpoint economic damage from the Iran war is signaling that there’s no cast-iron case to lift interest rates just yet.

title: Thailand Holds Key Rate to Support Economy Amid Oil Shock
title_cn: 泰国在石油危机中维持关键利率以支持经济
summary: The Bank of Thailand left its benchmark interest rate at a near four-year low, focusing for now on supporting the economy from the drag of the war in Iran rather than its potential inflationary impact.

title: Kpler Sees Brent as High as $125 If Blockade Continues
title_cn: Kpler 预计如果封锁继续，布伦特原油价格将高达 125 美元
summary: Homayoun Falakshahi, head of crude oil analysis at Kpler, discusses energy markets as investors focus on the next step for peace talks between the US and Iran. He tells Bloomberg Television that should the US manage to sustain its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz for another two months, "Iran's oil revenues will drop to zero." Falakshahi also warns that should the waterway remain closed for another two months, prices for oil could go back to "roughly 120, 125 [dollars a barrel] for Brent." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Rare Earth Firms Rally After Strong Earnings, Beijing Plan
title_cn: 中国稀土企业在强劲盈利后反弹，北京计划
summary: Shares in China’s major rare earths companies advanced after a swathe of strong first-quarter earnings and the unveiling of government plans for penalizing illegal production.

title: Volvo Is Ready to Help Geely Build Cars in Europe, CEO Says
title_cn: 沃尔沃首席执行官表示，沃尔沃已准备好帮助吉利在欧洲生产汽车
summary: Volvo Car AB is willing to give Geely access to its European factories so the Chinese parent can build cars in the region, Chief Executive Officer Hakan Samuelsson said.

title: Finland’s Kone Agrees to Buy TK Elevator for €29.4 Billion
title_cn: 芬兰通力同意以 294 亿欧元收购 TK Elevator
summary: Kone Oyj agreed to acquire TK Elevator for €29.4 billion ($34.4 billion) including debt, in what will be one of Europe’s biggest-ever private equity exits.

title: Spanish Inflation Unexpectedly Quickens Further Beyond ECB Goal
title_cn: 西班牙通胀意外加速，进一步超出欧洲央行目标
summary: Spanish inflation unexpectedly accelerated further beyond the European Central Bank’s 2% target, supporting market expectations that interest rates will be raised this year due to the Iran war.

title: UzNIF’s London IPO Set to Value Uzbekistan Fund at $1.95 Billion
title_cn: UzNIF 伦敦 IPO 将使乌兹别克斯坦基金估值达到 19.5 亿美元
summary: Uzbekistan’s national investment fund’s initial public offering is set to value the vehicle at about $1.95 billion, as it offers investors a rare way to invest into Central Asia’s second-biggest economy.

title: UBS Boss Ermotti Warns Investors on Iran Over-Confidence
title_cn: 瑞银集团总裁埃尔莫蒂警告投资者不要对伊朗过度自信
summary: UBS Group AG Chief Executive Officer Sergio Ermotti said that financial markets are at risk of over-optimism regarding the Iran conflict.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 4/29/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 4/29/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ermotti: UBS Aims to Complete $3 Bln Buyback by End July
title_cn: 埃尔莫蒂：瑞银计划在 7 月底前完成 30 亿美元的回购
summary: UBS Group AG Chief Executive Officer Sergio Ermotti discusses the bank’s intention to add to the $3 billion tally of share buybacks this year. Speaking to Bloomberg’s Guy Johnson, Ermotti says the lender believes it’s going to complete the $3 billion buyback “by the end of July.”

title: Haleon’s First-Quarter Sales Dragged Down by Weak Cold Season
title_cn: 海伦第一季度销售受冷季疲软拖累
summary: Haleon Plc’s first quarter was weaker than expected, hurt by lackluster demand for over-the-counter cold and flu medicines at the start of the year.

title: Blackstone to Invest €2 Billion in Renewables Developer Eurowind
title_cn: Blackstone 将向可再生能源开发商 Eurowind 投资 20 亿欧元
summary: Blackstone Inc. has agreed to invest as much as €2 billion ($2.3 billion) in Eurowind Energy, a pan-European renewables developer and independent power producer.

title: Central Banks ‘Scoop Up a Load’ of Gold in Bumpy First Quarter
title_cn: 各国央行在动荡的第一季度“囤积了大量”黄金
summary: Central banks added gold holdings at the fastest pace in more than a year in the first quarter, as a slump in prices encouraged a wave of buying that more than offset sales by a handful of institutions.

title: Distressed UK Firms Pile Up as War Enters Third Month, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，随着战争进入第三个月，陷入困境的英国企业不断增加
summary: UK companies faced a sharp jump in “critical” financial distress at the start of 2026, underscoring the mounting pressure that rising costs and weak consumer demand are placing on businesses as the war in the Middle East enters its third month.

title: Deutsche CFO: Trading Started ‘Constructively’ in April
title_cn: 德意志银行首席财务官：四月份交易开始“建设性”
summary: Deutsche Bank AG Chief Financial Officer Raja Akram discusses the lender’s performance in the first quarter as it posted higher-than-expected profit and revenue as income from trading held up and it earned more from asset management and retail banking. Akram says April “started constructively” after some jitters in March. He also discusses private credit and the uncertainty around the situation in the Middle East. Akram speaks to Bloomberg’s Oliver Crook.

title: Insight with Haslinda Amin 4/29/2026
title_cn: 哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 4/29/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTSE 100 Dips on Drag From Pharma Giants Astra and GSK
title_cn: 制药巨头 Astra 和 GSK 拖累富时 100 指数下跌

title: Deutsche Bank CFO Says Trading Business Started Well in April
title_cn: 德意志银行首席财务官表示四月份交易业务开局良好
summary: Deutsche Bank AG saw its fixed income and currencies trading business start “constructively” in the second quarter after some jitters in March, Chief Financial Officer Raja Akram said in an interview.

title: S.Korea SME & Startup Ministry on Domestic Growth
title_cn: 韩国中小企业和初创企业国内发展部
summary: Roh Yong-seok, Vice Minister of South Korea's SME and Startup Ministry, discusses the country's plans and strategy to support and grow domestic startups and enterprises, from injecting more funding for support and working with regional economies to bolster cooperation.  He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Handjani: OPEC Will Move Forward Weaker
title_cn: 汉贾尼：欧佩克将继续走弱
summary: The UAE has made a shock exit from OPEC blindsiding its partners and diluting the cartel's ability to steer oil prices via supply cuts. Amir Handjani, Non-resident fellow at the Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft spoke to Bloomberg's Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on the move and whether it was a political or economical decision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE Blindsides OPEC, OpenAI Sparks Tech Jitters | The Asia Trade 4/29/2026
title_cn: 阿联酋的盲点 OPEC、OpenAI 引发科技恐慌 |亚洲贸易 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amadeus Buys Idemia Border-Control Arm to Expand in Airports
title_cn: 艾玛迪斯购买 Idemia 边境管制部门以扩大机场业务
summary: Amadeus IT SA agreed to buy the public security arm of biometrics firm Idemia for €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion), adding border control to the Spanish travel software company’s airport services.

title: EU Escalates Probe Into Meta for Failing to Stop Kids Signing Up
title_cn: 欧盟升级对 Meta 未能阻止儿童注册的调查
summary: The European Union’s executive arm accused Meta Platforms Inc. of failing to keep young children off its services, ramping up a probe that could result in hefty fines.

title: Founder Gets 9-Year Jail Term in $300 Million Indonesia Case
title_cn: 创始人因印尼价值 3 亿美元的案件被判 9 年监禁
summary: Indonesia handed eFishery founder Gibran Huzaifah a nine-year prison sentence on Wednesday, concluding a high-profile $300 million financial scandal that destroyed one of Southeast Asia’s most celebrated startups.

title: Sri Lanka Discloses New Payment Lapse Days After Hack Revelation
title_cn: 斯里兰卡在黑客事件曝光几天后披露了新的付款失败情况
summary: Sri Lanka’s government has disclosed a payment lapse involving funds due to the US Post, days after revealing a separate cyberattack, raising fresh questions about its financial safeguards as it continues to recover from an unprecedented default.

title: James Murdoch-Backed Allen Career Institute Is Said to Consider India IPO
title_cn: 詹姆斯·默多克支持的艾伦职业学院据说考虑在印度首次公开募股
summary: Allen Career Institute, an Indian education services company backed by James Murdoch and ex-Disney executive Uday Shankar, is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai, people familiar with the matter said.

title: GoTo CEO on 1st Net Profit Quarter
title_cn: GoTo首席执行官谈第一季度净利润
summary: Hans Patuwo, CEO of GoTo Group, discusses the Indonesian ride-hailing and food delivery business outlook and growth strategy after it reported its first-ever net income, a major milestone in its turnaround effort. He speaks with Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pungent Fruit Gets Influencer Backing as Thailand Faces Glut
title_cn: 泰国面临供过于求之际，辛辣水果得到了有影响力的支持
summary: Thailand is turning to livestreamers to clear a looming durian glut, slashing prices as weaker Chinese demand threatens its biggest export market.

title: AI Spots Pancreatic Cancer Years Before It Shows Up, Study Finds
title_cn: 研究发现，人工智能可以在胰腺癌出现前数年发现它
summary: An artificial intelligence system can spot pancreatic cancer long before it shows up on scans, raising the prospect of catching one of the deadliest tumors early enough to successfully treat, a study found.

title: Samsung Dynasty’s Wealth Doubles to $45 Billion in Just One Year
title_cn: 三星王朝财富仅一年就翻倍至450亿美元
summary: When Lee Kun-hee, the patriarch behind Samsung Electronics Co. died in 2020, his dynasty soon dealt with a crisis on two fronts: first, a multi-billion-dollar inheritance tax. The following year, his son Jay Y. Lee was jailed after being convicted of bribing South Korea’s former President Park Geun-hye to win support for his succession.

title: GoTo Shares Have Biggest Jump in Four Months on First Net Income
title_cn: GoTo 股价首次净利润出现四个月来最大涨幅
summary: GoTo Group shares jumped after the Indonesian ride-hailing and food delivery company reported its first-ever net income, a major milestone in its turnaround effort.

title: Nvidia-Supplier Victory Giant’s Sales Surge on AI Demand
title_cn: Nvidia-供应商胜利巨人因人工智能需求而销量激增
summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. reported a 28% yearly increase in its first-quarter sales on stronger demand for printed circuit boards used in AI servers.

title: AI Boom Drives 770% Jump in Asia’s Lesser-Known Chip Supplier
title_cn: AI 热潮带动亚洲鲜为人知的芯片供应商股价跃升 770%
summary: The artificial intelligence rally exploding across Asia is now spreading deeper into the supply chain.

title: Goldman Staff in Hong Kong Lose Access to Anthropic’s Claude
title_cn: 高盛香港员工失去与 Anthropic 克劳德的联系
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s staff in Hong Kong no longer have access to Anthropic’s Claude, an AI agent that speeds the process of writing computer software, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: China’s Meta Backlash Renders Manus Model ‘Officially Dead’
title_cn: 中国的元强烈反对使马努斯模式“正式死亡”
summary: The AI startup Manus, once hailed as a breakthrough that would challenge Silicon Valley’s dominance, is turning into a cautionary tale for Chinese entrepreneurs after Beijing authorities ordered Meta Platforms Inc. to unwind its $2 billion takeover of the company.

title: TDK CEO on Business Strategy, AI Boom Impact
title_cn: TDK 首席执行官谈商业战略、AI 繁荣影响
summary: Noboru Saito, Director and CEO at Japanese electronic components maker TDK, discusses the company's latest earnings and the business impact from the AI boom. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Testifies He’s Suing OpenAI to Stop Altman’s ‘Looting’
title_cn: 马斯克证实他起诉 OpenAI 是为了阻止奥特曼的“抢劫”
summary: Elon Musk testified Tuesday he’s suing OpenAI and two of its co-founders — Sam Altman and Greg Brockman — because the startup’s pivot from a charity to a for-profit business is wrong and sets a concerning precedent for other philanthropic efforts.

title: AI Power-Gear Spending in US Surging Up to $65 Billion
title_cn: 美国人工智能动力装置支出飙升至 650 亿美元
summary: US spending on power-generation equipment for data centers may reach $65 billion by 2030, up from $2.6 billion last year, with the rapidly growing industry accounting for the largest share of the total market, according to a report Tuesday from Wood Mackenzie Ltd.

title: Booking Slides as Second-Quarter Guidance Misses on Mideast
title_cn: 由于中东地区第二季度业绩指引未达标，预订量下滑
summary: Booking Holdings Inc forecast worse-than-expected second-quarter revenue growth and cut its outlook for the full year as travel demand suffers from the conflict in the Middle East.

title: OpenAI Linked Stocks Fall on Report It Missed Targets | Bloomberg Tech 4/28/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 相关股票因报告未达到目标而下跌彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss the fall in stocks linked to OpenAI after a report from the Wall Street Journal said the company failed to meet its own sales and user targets. Plus, a jury has been selected for the trial between OpenAI and Elon Musk over whether the company abandoned its founding mission. And, late-night host Jimmy Kimmel defends comments he made that prompted President Donald Trump to call for him to be fired. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spotify Shares Fall as Income Forecast Comes Up Short
title_cn: Spotify 股价下跌，因收入预测未达标
summary: Spotify Technology SA shares plunged the most in more than four years after the music streaming leader gave a forecast for operating income in the second quarter that missed analysts’ estimates.

title: North Korea’s Nuclear Program Reaches Tipping Point for the US
title_cn: 朝鲜核计划对美国来说已达到临界点
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, how North Korea’s rapid missile buildup is challenging US defenses and reshaping regional ties.

title: Kalshi on Insider Trading: Not Just Regulators' Problem
title_cn: 卡尔希谈内幕交易：不仅仅是监管机构的问题
summary:
Robert Denault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Prediction markets have quickly grown from a niche corner of finance to a multibillion-dollar industry with big Wall Street investment, but a growing list of insider trading allegations is bringing concerns about the platforms all the way to the White House. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Signs Deal to Allow AI in Classified Military Work
title_cn: 谷歌签署协议允许人工智能参与机密军事工作
summary: Google has reached an agreement with the US Defense Department to allow its artificial intelligence systems to be used for classified military work, according to a Pentagon official, a deal that came together as researchers at the company protested against it.

title: NXP Rallies After Stronger Auto Market Bolsters Forecast
title_cn: 汽车市场走强增强预测后恩智浦股价上涨
summary: NXP Semiconductors NV jumped in late trading after giving an upbeat revenue forecast, a sign the chipmaker is bouncing back from a prolonged auto industry slump and tariff uncertainties.

title: OpenAI-Linked Stocks Slump on Report It Missed Key Targets
title_cn: OpenAI 相关股票因未能实现关键目标而暴跌
summary: A constellation of artificial-intelligence stocks dropped after OpenAI reportedly failed to meet its sales and user targets, rekindling doubts that the hundreds of billions of dollars that big companies are plowing into the technology will deliver sufficient profits anytime soon.

title: $300 Million Crypto Hack Raises DeFi Security Concerns
title_cn: 价值 3 亿美元的加密货币黑客攻击引发 DeFi 安全担忧
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Decentralized finance is in the midst of the largest coordinated rescue in its history. This comes a week after a security breach at a small crypto protocol called KelpDAO triggered a $10 billion run on Aave, the largest DeFi lending protocol.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kalshi Says Surveillance Systems Keep Eye Out for Insider Trading
title_cn: 卡尔希表示监控系统密切关注内幕交易
summary: Robert Denault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Prediction markets have quickly grown from a niche corner of finance to a multibillion-dollar industry with big Wall Street investment, but a growing list of insider trading allegations is bringing concerns about the platforms all the way to the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Hits Back at Growth Fears, Says ‘Firing on All Cylinders’
title_cn: OpenAI 回击增长担忧，表示“全力以赴”
summary:
OpenAI pushed back against concerns over its sales growth on Tuesday, saying its consumer and enterprise businesses are “firing on all cylinders” despite a report about the AI startup missing internal targets.
The ChatGPT creator said it continues to see growth in demand from business customers and its nascent advertising business. “The mood internally is incredibly positive,” the company said in a statement. The Wall Street Journal reported late Monday that OpenAI had fallen short of several internal targets as rivals gained ground. OpenAI described the report as “prime clickbait.”  Rudina Seseri, Glasswing Ventures Founder & Managing Partner joined to discuss on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Up More Than 10% In April, SEC Chair Outline Crypto Plans | Bloomberg Crypto 4/28/2026
title_cn: 4 月份比特币上涨超过 10%，SEC 主席概述加密货币计划彭博加密货币 4/28/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Andreessen Horowitz Former General Partner Arianna Simpson, The Digital Chamber Founder and Chair Perianne Boring, eToro Co-Founder and CEO Yoni Assia, and Kalshi Head of Enforcement Robert DeNault.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Seeks First Win in West Bengal With Polls in Last Phase
title_cn: 莫迪在最后阶段的民意调查中寻求西孟加拉邦的首场胜利
summary: Millions of voters in India’s eastern state of West Bengal head to the polls on Wednesday in the final phase of a key local election, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi seeks to win there for the first time.

title: Von der Leyen Warns Iran War May Damage Europe for Years
title_cn: 冯德莱恩警告伊朗战争可能会损害欧洲多年
summary: The European Union warned the continent may spend years grappling with fallout from the US-Israeli war in Iran, signaling that an energy price spike will not abate soon.

title: Iraq Politicians Chose New Candidate for PM After Trump Pressure
title_cn: 在特朗普的压力下，伊拉克政界人士选择了新的总理候选人
summary: Former Iraqi Prime Minister Nouri Al-Maliki ended his bid to reclaim the role after pressure from the US, which was concerned by his close links to Iran.

title: US Signals It Will Stick With Hormuz Naval Blockade
title_cn: 美国表示将坚持霍尔木兹海军封锁
summary: The US signaled there will be no letup with its naval blockade of Iranian ports, as it tries to choke-off Tehran’s oil exports and force it back to the negotiating table. The blockade lies at the heart of the impasse between the US and Iran, with the Islamic Republic insisting it won’t restart negotiations or reopen the Strait of Hormuz as long as the naval restrictions stay in place. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Germany’s Merz ‘Doesn’t Know What He’s Talking About’
title_cn: 特朗普称德国默茨“不知道他在说什么”
summary: Donald Trump attacked Germany’s Friedrich Merz after the chancellor criticized the US handling of its war on Iran.

title: Russia Cuts Tanks, Missiles From Putin’s WWII Parade in First Since 2007
title_cn: 俄罗斯自2007年以来首次削减普京二战阅兵中的坦克和导弹
summary: Russia will stage its traditional May 9 parade marking the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II without heavy military equipment for the first time since 2007, as the war in Ukraine takes its toll on President Vladimir Putin’s army.

title: Kosovo Set for Third Straight Snap Vote to Break Deadlock
title_cn: 科索沃将连续第三次快速投票打破僵局
summary: Kosovo is poised for its third snap general election after Prime Minister Albin Kurti failed to find enough allies in parliament to back his pick for president by a midnight deadline.

title: US Signals No Letup of Naval Blockade as It Aims to Squeeze Iran
title_cn: 美国表示不会放松海军封锁，旨在挤压伊朗
summary: The US signaled it would stick with a naval blockade of Iranian ports, as it tries to choke-off Tehran’s oil exports and force it back to the negotiating table.

title: Mali Reaffirms Russia Ties After Major Jihadist Assault
title_cn: 马里在重大圣战分子袭击后重申与俄罗斯的关系
summary: Mali’s leadership signaled it will not rethink its Russia-backed security strategy, even as the scale of rebel attacks over the weekend raises fresh questions over its effectiveness. Insurgents recaptured the Malian town of Kidal, a town that Kremlin-linked fighters wrested back in 2023. Africa Corps, a force overseen by Russia’s defense ministry, announced it was withdrawing from Kidal. The pullback punctures the claim that Moscow could deliver where France and other Western allies could not. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary’s Magyar Is Pushing for Rapid Access to Billions From EU
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔正在推动快速获得来自欧盟的数十亿美元资金
summary: Hungary’s incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar will push for a deal to restore access to billion of euros in frozen European Union aid during the first trip to Brussels since his landslide election victory two weeks ago.

title: UK’s Split-Screen Moment Lays Bare Struggle to Adapt to Trump
title_cn: 英国的分屏时刻暴露了适应特朗普的斗争
summary: In one legislative chamber, a British king appealed to centuries of shared history in a bid to preserve his country’s most important alliance. In another, an ocean away, a British prime minister watched his agenda get sidelined again by his past efforts to protect the US-UK “special relationship.”

title: Ukraine Faces Risk of Tougher EU Loan Terms to Get Aid Payouts
title_cn: 乌克兰面临欧盟贷款条件更严格以获得援助的风险
summary: The European Union is considering imposing stricter conditions on its €90 billion ($105 billion) loan to Ukraine, making some of the payouts dependent on the introduction of an unpopular tax change for businesses, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Vietnam’s To Lam to Give Keynote Speech at Asian Defense Forum
title_cn: 越南国防部长苏林将在亚洲防务论坛上发表主题演讲
summary: Vietnam’s General Secretary and President To Lam will deliver the keynote address at Asia’s top security summit this year, giving the Southeast Asian leader a high-profile opportunity to address long-standing territorial tensions with Beijing in the South China Sea.

title: Trump Tells Aides to Prep for Lengthy Hormuz Blockade, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，特朗普告诉助手为长期霍尔木兹封锁做好准备
summary: President Donald Trump told his aides to prepare for an extended US Naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, the Wall Street Journal reported, as the US looks to intensify economic pressure on Iran as the war enters its third month.

title: China-US Tensions Build Over Iran and AI Before Trump Meets Xi
title_cn: 在特朗普会见习近平之前，中美围绕伊朗和人工智能的紧​​张局势加剧
summary: Donald Trump and Xi Jinping are headed toward a summit next month with a shared desire to stabilize ties. That calm is being tested as both leaders rush to shore up strategic vulnerabilities over Iranian oil and AI.

title: US Threatens to Sanction Banks That Help China Buy Iran Oil
title_cn: 美国威胁制裁帮助中国购买伊朗石油的银行
summary: The US has warned banks they are at risk of secondary sanctions if they support Chinese private refiners that buy Iranian oil, cranking up pressure on Tehran even at the cost of further irking Beijing just weeks ahead of a leaders’ meeting.

title: Philippine Tax Agency Orders Probe on VP Duterte’s Businesses
title_cn: 菲律宾税务局下令对副总统杜特尔特的业务进行调查
summary: The Philippine tax agency has ordered tax audits on nine businesses tied to Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband.

title: Xi Has $1.2 Trillion Rare Earths Leverage Ahead of Trump Visit
title_cn: 在特朗普访问之前，习近平拥有 1.2 万亿美元的稀土筹码
summary: China’s dominance of rare earths supply chains gives President Xi Jinping economic leverage worth $1.2 trillion in his planned summit meeting with US President Donald Trump in Beijing next month.

title: Some Spirit Lenders Balk as US Rescue Talks Hit Impasse
title_cn: 美国救援谈判陷入僵局，一些烈酒贷款人犹豫不决
summary: Talks over a potential $500 million US government rescue financing deal for Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. have hit an impasse, with a lender group that includes Citadel, resisting terms that would likely severely impair their claims and recoveries, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump Nominates Ex-Bessent Hedge Fund Executive to Treasury Post
title_cn: 特朗普提名前贝森特对冲基金高管出任财政部长
summary: President Donald Trump has nominated G. Hunter McMaster II to be assistant Treasury secretary for Financial Markets, though he has been performing the duties of that post since last July.

title: King Charles Urges US to Reject Isolationism in Landmark Speech
title_cn: 查尔斯国王在具有里程碑意义的讲话中敦促美国拒绝孤立主义
summary: King Charles III called on the US to maintain its leadership role in the world, and to support Ukraine and the North Atlantic Treaty Organization, in a remarkably pointed speech for a monarch that urged Americans to resist the pull of isolationism.

title: King Charles Addresses Congress in US Visit | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/28/2026
title_cn: 查尔斯国王访问美国期间向国会发表讲话权力平衡：最新版 04/28/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sir Peter Westmacott, former UK Ambassador to the US, says King Charles III's speech to Congress focused on the "importance of the relationship" between the US and UK while stressing NATO solidarity. Michelle Brouhard, Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk at Kpler, says the UAE's exit reflects a long-running rift within OPEC, calling it a "new chapter." Representative Sean Casten (D-IL) criticizes Energy Secretary Chris Wright’s comments that demand for US energy exports is growing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s $1.5 Trillion Defense Plan Draws Rare Republican Pushback
title_cn: 特朗普 1.5 万亿美元的国防计划罕见地遭到共和党的抵制
summary: Key congressional Republicans are poised to break with Donald Trump on his proposed 44% raise for the Pentagon, a rare act of defiance that signals the president’s weakening grip on Washington as the midterm elections near and he quickly approaches the back half of his second term.

title: King Charles Urges US to Reject Isolationism in Landmark Speech
title_cn: 查尔斯国王在具有里程碑意义的讲话中敦促美国拒绝孤立主义
summary: King Charles III called on the US to maintain its leadership role in the world in a remarkably pointed speech for a monarch that urged Americans to resist the pull of isolationism. Ellen Milligan has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran May Shut Oil Wells in 5-6 Days: Kpler's Brouhard
title_cn: 伊朗可能在 5-6 天内关闭油井：Kpler 的 Brouhard
summary: Michelle Brouhard, Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk at Kpler, says the UAE's exit reflects a long-running rift within OPEC, calling it a "new chapter" after years with "one foot in and one foot out." She pushes back on claims Iran is collapsing, saying it has faced pressure "for about five or six years," but warns the country may have only "five or six days" before shutting oil wells due to storage constraints. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Ambassador on King Charles III's Address to Congress
title_cn: 先生。查理三世国王向国会发表讲话的大使
summary: Sir Peter Westmacott, former UK Ambassador to the US, says King Charles III's speech to Congress focused on the "importance of the relationship" between the US and UK while stressing NATO solidarity. Sir Westmacott highlights the King's concern over Ukraine and his warning against isolationism, and says President Donald Trump has "always had a soft spot for the British monarchy" and views the King as a "close friend," despite more "frayed" ties with Prime Minister Keir Starmer. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Reeves Wins Battle for Power to Require Pensions to Invest in UK
title_cn: 里夫斯赢得了要求养老金投资英国的权力之战
summary: UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves has won a battle for the authority to force pension funds to invest a proportion of their assets in the country, one of her economic growth initiatives that had been stymied by the House of Lords.
